metadata.note: chalk_upset_ev = sum(pick_share_at_death/100 * field_size) across all entry deaths in a season run. Field size does not affect entry_weeks_survived (survival is binary).

hypothesis_results.H2: VALIDATED — Optimal CW trend: [(20, 0.0), (50, 0.0), (100, 0.0), (500, 0.5), (5000, 0.5), (14000, 0.5)]. Monotonically increasing.
hypothesis_results.H3: VALIDATED — CW=0% EW=27.9 vs best 70/30-blend EW=27.0 (gap=-3.1%). Small pools get little benefit from contrarian weighting.
